/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/omni_sim.dir/simple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/omni_sim.dir/src/ballbot_pid.cpp.o -o omni_sim   -L/home/coco/project/omni/omni_sim/../third_party/mujoco/mujoco_3_1/lib  -L/home/coco/project/omni/omni_sim/../third_party/mujoco_interface/build  -L/home/coco/project/omni/omni_sim/../third_party/plotjuggler_interface/build  -Wl,-rpath,/home/coco/project/omni/omni_sim/../third_party/mujoco/mujoco_3_1/lib:/home/coco/project/omni/omni_sim/../third_party/mujoco_interface/build:/home/coco/project/omni/omni_sim/../third_party/plotjuggler_interface/build:/home/coco/project/omni/third_party/mujoco/mujoco_3_1/lib /home/coco/project/omni/third_party/mujoco/mujoco_3_1/lib/libmujoco.so /home/coco/project/omni/omni_sim/../third_party/mujoco_interface/build/libui_interface.a /home/coco/project/omni/omni_sim/../third_party/mujoco_interface/build/libmj_interface.a /home/coco/project/omni/omni_sim/../third_party/plotjuggler_interface/build/libplotjuggler_interface.a -lglfw -lGL -lpthread -ldl -lyaml-cpp
